Issue: AutoencoderKlMaisi forces CUDA transfer on CPU inputs
Decision: Fix the bug in AutoencoderKlMaisi to prevent forced CUDA transfer on CPU inputs
Rationale: The fix ensures that the model does not force a transfer to CUDA when input tensors and the model are on CPU, addressing unnecessary device transfers and improving efficiency.
Author: ytl0623
Description: AutoencoderKlMaisi model and _concatenate_tensors method in MaisiConvolution
Cost: Minimal (only modifies device transfer logic in _concatenate_tensors method)
Risk: Low (no new risks introduced, only fixes unnecessary CUDA transfer)
